title: Create: Astralyte!
description: This mod adds a brand-new, extremely rare ore that can only be found in the End. With it, you can craft tools, blocks, and armor that are even stronger than Netherite!
body:
WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?

This mod adds a very rare new mineral stronger than netherite, usable for crafting weapons, tools, and blocks!
Here is a list of items added by the mod:

-Astralyte Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel & Hoe. ⚔️⚒️
-Astralyte Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings & Boots (With a unique effect of Resistance if you wear all the pieces of armor) (Trimmable!) 🛡️
-Raw Astralyte (Dropped by the ore) 🌌
-Astralyte Ingot (Just put in the furnace the raw astralyte for getting it)
-Astralyte Ore (The block that give you the Raw Astralyte)
-Raw Astralyte Block & Astralyte Block

⛏️ WHERE CAN I FIND THIS MINERAL?

You can find this mineral anywhere in the End, from Y-level 40 down to Y-level 0, in veins of up to 4 blocks.

⚠️ IMPORTANT THINGS TO DO BEFORE SEARCHING FOR THE MINERAL ⚠️

-Make sure to bring at least a Netherite pickaxe or any modded pickaxe with a tier higher than Netherite, otherwise you won’t be able to obtain drops from Astralyte ore.

-Always watch out for the void! Since this material is only found in the End, be extremely careful when mining near Y-level 0—you could fall into the void and lose everything!


 

IS IT COMPATIBLE WITH JEI?
YES! You can see all the craftings from the jei tab.

CAN I PLAY WITH FRIENDS? 🎮
YES! Like other mods, you just need to start the server and make sure that the other players have the mod installed just like you!

 

CAN I USE IT FOR VIDEOS OR MODPACKS?

ABSOLUTELY!
-Just Make sure that if you want to create and publish a modpack with this mod, you are only allowed to monetize it on CurseForge and Modrinth—unless you have specific written permission from me granting you authorization!

 

HAVE FUN! 

~Elghedy
